nodes.name: advisory_lock.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for advisory lock functions, testing pg_advisory_lock, pg_try_advisory_lock, and related lock management functions.

nodes.name: aggregates.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL covering aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, variance, stddev, etc.), ordered-set aggregates, and window aggregates.

nodes.name: alter_generic.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for generic ALTER object statements including ALTER FUNCTION, ALTER VIEW, ALTER TYPE, and other DDL alterations.

nodes.name: alter_operator.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for ALTER OPERATOR statements, testing modification of custom operator definitions.

nodes.name: alter_table.sql
nodes.summary: Extensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL for ALTER TABLE operations including ADD/DROP column, constraint management, table inheritance, and partitioning.

nodes.name: amutils.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for access method utility functions, testing index AM-specific introspection queries.

nodes.name: arrays.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for array type operations including array constructors, subscript access, array functions, and multi-dimensional arrays.

nodes.name: async.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for asynchronous notification features (LISTEN/NOTIFY), testing async messaging functionality.

nodes.name: bit.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for bit string types (BIT, BIT VARYING), testing bitwise operations, comparison, and conversions.

nodes.name: bitmapops.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for bitmap index scan operations and bitmap AND/OR operations in query execution.

nodes.name: boolean.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for boolean type operations, testing truth values, boolean operators, and NULL handling in boolean expressions.

nodes.name: box.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for geometric box type operations, testing box constructors, containment operators, and spatial queries.

nodes.name: brin.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for BRIN (Block Range Index) index creation, maintenance, and query usage.

nodes.name: brin_bloom.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for BRIN bloom filter indexes, testing bloom-based range index creation and query performance.

nodes.name: brin_multi.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for BRIN multi-range indexes, testing multi-range block range index creation and scan behavior.

nodes.name: btree_index.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for B-tree index creation, maintenance, and query optimization including covering indexes.

nodes.name: case.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CASE expressions (searched and simple CASE, COALESCE, NULLIF, GREATEST, LEAST), testing conditional expression semantics.

nodes.name: char.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CHAR and VARCHAR types, testing fixed-length and variable-length string storage and comparison.

nodes.name: circle.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for geometric circle type operations, testing circle constructors, containment, and overlap operators.

nodes.name: cluster.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for the CLUSTER command, testing table physical reordering by index and cluster metadata.
